name: Donald Voorhees
abstract: Donald Voorhees (July 26, 1903– January 10, 1989) was an American composer and conductor who received an Emmy Award nomination for "Individual Achievements in Music" for his work on the television series,  The Bell Telephone Hour.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Lesberg
about_quotes.evidence: Donald Voorhees was the conductor... he recommended me to take his place with “The Bell Telephone Hour”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Lesberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997
